model.dogfood.stg_events.name: stg_events
model.dogfood.stg_events.raw_sql: select convert_timezone('UTC','America/New_York', event_ts) as event_ts, user_id, status, updated_at from raw.events
model.dogfood.stg_events.compiled_sql: select convert_timezone('UTC','America/New_York', event_ts) as event_ts, user_id, status, updated_at from raw.events

model.dogfood.stg_orders.name: stg_orders
model.dogfood.stg_orders.raw_sql: select order_id, user_id, account_id, status, discount_amount, amount, updated_at from raw.orders
model.dogfood.stg_orders.compiled_sql: select order_id, user_id, account_id, status, discount_amount, amount, updated_at from raw.orders

model.dogfood.finance_daily_revenue.name: finance_daily_revenue
model.dogfood.finance_daily_revenue.raw_sql: select date(event_ts) as revenue_day, status, count(*) as orders, sum(amount) as revenue from {{ ref('stg_events') }} where status in ('paid','refunded') group by 1,2
model.dogfood.finance_daily_revenue.compiled_sql: select date(event_ts) as revenue_day, status, count(*) as orders, sum(amount) as revenue from analytics.stg_events where status in ('paid','refunded') group by 1,2

model.dogfood.incremental_events.name: incremental_events
model.dogfood.incremental_events.raw_sql: {{ config(materialized='incremental') }} select * from {{ ref('stg_events') }} {% if is_incremental() %} where date(updated_at) >= date((select max(updated_at) from {{ this }})) or updated_at is null {% endif %}
model.dogfood.incremental_events.compiled_sql: select * from analytics.stg_events where date(updated_at) >= date((select max(updated_at) from this)) or updated_at is null

model.dogfood.user_revenue.name: user_revenue
model.dogfood.user_revenue.raw_sql: select u.account_id, sum(o.amount) as revenue from {{ ref('stg_orders') }} o join {{ ref('dim_accounts') }} u on o.account_id = u.account_id group by 1
model.dogfood.user_revenue.compiled_sql: select u.account_id, sum(o.amount) as revenue from analytics.stg_orders o join analytics.dim_accounts u on o.account_id = u.account_id group by 1

model.dogfood.dim_accounts.name: dim_accounts
model.dogfood.dim_accounts.raw_sql: select account_id, user_id, account_tier from raw.accounts
model.dogfood.dim_accounts.compiled_sql: select account_id, user_id, account_tier from raw.accounts

model.dogfood.refund_adjustments.name: refund_adjustments
model.dogfood.refund_adjustments.raw_sql: select order_id, case when status = 'paid' then amount when status = 'refunded' then -amount end as net_revenue from {{ ref('stg_orders') }}
model.dogfood.refund_adjustments.compiled_sql: select order_id, case when status = 'paid' then amount when status = 'refunded' then -amount end as net_revenue from analytics.stg_orders

model.dogfood.discount_metrics.name: discount_metrics
model.dogfood.discount_metrics.raw_sql: select date(updated_at) as day, sum(coalesce(discount_amount, 0)) as discount_total from {{ ref('stg_orders') }} group by 1
model.dogfood.discount_metrics.compiled_sql: select date(updated_at) as day, sum(coalesce(discount_amount, 0)) as discount_total from analytics.stg_orders group by 1
